positive: A whimsical, stylized graphic illustration of a celestial forest scene. The composition features large, fantastical trees with glowing, bioluminescent leaves that evoke a stained-glass effect. Central to the scene is a group of gentle, stylized woodland creatures—a fox, a deer, and an owl—sitting under the canopy. The overall mood is magical and serene. Use a vibrant palette of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, amethyst purples, and pops of gold, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. The style should be reminiscent of detailed vintage scientific illustration meets modern fantasy vector art. Flat graphic design style with subtle metallic foil textures for extra depth. Perfect for apparel print placement, symmetrical composition, perfect symmetry.
